name: Chicken Soup with Mongo Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Fryer chicken, cut into 1-inch pieces
1 thumb-sized ginger root or 2 tsp powdered ginger
3/4 lb Mongo beans, boiled and peeled
1 can of anchovy fillets (may be used)
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry chicken in oil until slightly brown, stirring constantly.
2. Add ginger and garlic and stir until garlic is browned.
3. Add tomatoes until soft.
4. Add 4 cups of water.
5. If using anchovy instead of Patis, add the anchovy fillets and cook for a moment.
6. Bring to boil, then simmer until chicken is tender.
7. While cooking the chicken, peel mongo beans by placing a bean between your fingers and rubbing the skin off.
8. Drain peeled beans and rinse with cold water.
9. Add the drained beans to the soup.
10. Cook until the soup thickens and the beans are soft.
11. If needed, add more water 5 minutes before serving.
12. Add Patis if anchovies are not available.
Variation: Bitter melons (sliced) or leafy vegetables like spinach may be used. Pork may replace chicken.
